structures.name: Summoning Altar
structures.description:
Offer a Slab depicting a Pal
to summon a powerful Pal to your base.
Adequate caution and battle readiness is paramount.

structures.name: Ancient Furnace
structures.description:
This specially designed furnace can create any kind of ingot. 
Materials are first melted down under intense heat, then blasted with ice to solidify the liquid metal. 
This smelting process requires two Pals—one with a high level of Kindling, the other with Cooling.

structures.name: Ancient Kitchen
structures.description:
From time-tested dishes to groundbreaking new cuisines, this kitchen can do it all. 
Precision heat control and fine finishing work ensures that every dish comes out perfectly. 
Operating this state-of-the-(ancient)-art system requires a Pal with high-level Kindling and Handiwork skills.

structures.name: Ancient Power Generator
structures.description:
Crafted using long-lost ancient technology, this power generator is hyper-efficient. 
While its output is immense, it's also prone to overheating. 
As a result, operation requires two Pals—one with a high level of Generating Electricity, the other with Watering.

structures.name: Ancient Farm
structures.description:
Thanks to the World Tree, this ancient plot can grow any plant from the Palpagos Islands. 
Smaller than a berry plantation and capable of being placed indoors, the cultivation process remains unchanged from conventional plots. 
Pals with high-level Planting and Watering abilities are required to run this farm.

structures.name: Ancient Material Manifester
structures.description:
By harnessing the power of the World Tree, this ancient tool can produce any wood or ore under the sun. 
Due to the complex nature of this structure, only one Pal can be assigned to it at a time.

structures.name: Ancient Relic Recycler
structures.description:
This piece of long-lost equipment converts equally ancient materials into other substances, bringing things full circle. 
It unravels Ancient Relics, transforming them into something entirely new and considerably improved. 
This special machine is the best way to put any relics you have lying around to even better use.

structures.name: Ancient Workbench
structures.description:
A workbench that is capable of crafting any item, but can only be used by Pals. 
Operates at the same speed as a regular workbench, despite the restrictions. 
Due to its advanced equipment, Pals with high-level Handiwork and Medicine Production work suitability are required.

structures.name: Ancient Clinic
structures.description: The reemergence of ancient technology has resulted in a boost to medical services, culminating in this top-tier clinic. Larger than a general clinic, it can protect against even more ailments. By assigning a Pal with pharmaceutical skills to it, even bases with grueling labor standards can be kept to the highest levels of cleanliness.

structures.name: Ancient Diagonal Wall
structures.description: An angled wall built on triangular foundations for keeping out intruders. A faithful reproduction of the style favored by ancient architects.

structures.name: Ancient Wall and Door
structures.description: Door built on a foundation. Becomes an entrance. A faithful reproduction of the style favored by ancient architects.

structures.name: Ancient Fence
structures.description:
Fencing built on foundations and roofs for keeping out intruders. 
A faithful reproduction of the style favored by ancient architects.

structures.name: Ancient Pal Bed
structures.description:
Placing a soft mattress in this ancient recovery pod has turned it into the ultimate Pal Bed. 
It promotes higher rates of SAN recovery and whisks fatigue away faster than any other model. 
Similar in size to a Large Pal Bed, it can accommodate most Pals with ease.

structures.name: Ancient Pillar
structures.description: Column for structural support. A faithful reproduction of the style favored by ancient architects.

structures.name: Ancient Pyramid Roof
structures.description: A pyramidal roof built on top of walls to keep out the rain and wind. A faithful reproduction of the style favored by ancient architects.

structures.name: Ancient Slanted Roof
structures.description: A slanted roof built on top of walls to keep out the rain and wind. A faithful reproduction of the style favored by ancient architects.

structures.name: Ancient Slanted Triangular Roof
structures.description: A slanted triangular roof built on top of walls to keep out the rain and wind. A faithful reproduction of the style favored by ancient architects.

structures.name: Ancient Slanted Triangular Roof (Inverted)
structures.description:
An inverted slanted triangular roof built on top of walls to keep out the rain and wind. 
A faithful reproduction of the style favored by ancient architects.

structures.name: Ancient Hot Spring
structures.description:
Made with ancient technology, this bath's warm water is infused with mineral Paldium. 
The same size as a regular hot spring, not only does it boast higher SAN restoring powers than any other bath available, it replenishes physical endurance. 
Injured Pals can rest and recuperate without a care in the world.

structures.name: Ancient Triangular Foundation
structures.description: A triangular foundation for building walls or facilities on. A faithful reproduction of the style favored by ancient architects.

structures.name: Ancient Triangular Roof
structures.description: A triangular roof built on top of walls to keep out the rain and wind. A faithful reproduction of the style favored by ancient architects.

structures.name: Ancient Corner Roof
structures.description: A corner roof built on top of walls to keep out the rain and wind. A faithful reproduction of the style favored by ancient architects.

structures.name: Ancient Triangular Wall

structures.name: Ancient Triangular Wall (Inverted)
structures.description: An inverted triangular wall built on a foundation for keeping out intruders. A faithful reproduction of the style favored by ancient architects.

structures.name: Ancient Pal Passage Entrance
structures.description: An entrance to a Pal passage built on a foundation. A faithful reproduction of the style favored by ancient architects.

structures.name: Ancient Wall and Window
structures.description: A wall built on a foundation for keeping out intruders. Includes a window. A faithful reproduction of the style favored by ancient architects.

structures.name: Ancient Foundation
structures.description: A foundation for building walls or facilities on. A faithful reproduction of the style favored by ancient architects.

structures.name: Ancient Roof
structures.description: A roof built on top of walls to keep out the rain and wind. A faithful reproduction of the style favored by ancient architects.

structures.name: Ancient Stairs
structures.description: Stairs placed below a foundation or roof for climbing up. A faithful reproduction of the style favored by ancient architects.

structures.name: Ancient Wall

structures.name: Japanese Paper Lantern

Decorative Paper Lantern.

structures.name: Arcade Game Cabinet
structures.description: A decorative arcade game cabinet. Sadly, broken, and can't be played.

structures.name: Wooden Barrel
structures.description: Wooden barrel for storing items.

structures.name: Alarm Bell
structures.description:

Change Pal behavior to either attack invading enemies, or focus entirely on work whenever you like.

structures.name: Item Retrieval Machine
structures.description: A device that lets you freely access items from all chests in the base.

structures.name: Monitoring Stand
structures.description:
Command your Pals to work on various things inside a base.
You can allow or prohibit individual kinds of work.

structures.name: High Quality Monitoring Stand
structures.description:
A more refined monitoring stand, made from superior materials. 
In addition to being able to issue work orders, the system also lowers the SAN cost for Pals working on the base. 
Any improvements to working conditions are always appreciated by Pals, keeping satisfaction levels high.

structures.name: Ancient Monitoring Stand
structures.description:
A monitoring stand covered in Red Paldium, powered by ancient technology. 
Most directives are carried out via a programmable interface, greatly reducing the SAN cost. 
It emits a special wavelength that covers bases, keeping Pals calm in even the harshest working environments.

structures.name: Palbox Control Device
structures.description:
A remote-access terminal for the Palbox. 
Set it up wherever you'd like and build a base of your own design.

structures.name: Antique Bathtub

structures.name: Improved Furnace

structures.description:

Requires a Fire Pal to light a flame.

It can only be used to grill simple ingredients.

structures.name: Majestic Candlestick

It can be placed on the ground. Requires a Fire Pal to light a flame.

structures.name: Witch Cauldron
structures.description:
Place in base to improve medicine manufacturing speed.
Placing more than one has no additional effect.

structures.name: Ceiling Lamp
structures.description:
A light source that provides illumination to a base even at night.
It can be placed on a ceiling.
Requires electricity, but lights up a larger area.

structures.name: Leather Chair
structures.description: Decorative leather chair.

structures.description: Decorative wooden chair.

structures.name: Antique Green Wooden Chair
structures.description: Decorative antique green wooden chair.

structures.name: Pal Essence Condenser
structures.description:
A chamber for increasing a Pal's rank.
Pals can surpass their physical limitations if given
a concentrated extract taken from a Pal of the same type.

structures.name: Clinic
structures.description: A basic medical facility, for managing the health of any Pals working on base. By assigning a Pal with pharmaceutical skills to it, SAN values are reduced, and illnesses and injuries are made more manageable. While it would be impossible to expect a pristine base at all times, sanitation management is truly pivotal in the early establishment stages.

structures.name: Antique Grandfather Clock
structures.description:
Decorative antique grandfather clock.
Broken, it doesn't tell time.

structures.name: Wall Clock
structures.description:
Decorative wall clock.
Broken, it doesn't tell time.

structures.name: Coal Mine
structures.description:
Facility for producing <itemName id=|Coal|/>.
Digging <itemName id=|Coal|/> is grueling physical work.
Leave it to a Pal that is good at mining.

structures.name: Drafting Table
structures.description: A facility that lets you combine multiple schematics to create more advanced ones.

structures.name: Free Pal Alliance Flag
structures.description: Decorative Free Pal Alliance flag.

structures.description: Decorative Free Pal Alliance horizontal banner.

structures.name: Large Container

Large container for storing items.

structures.name: Cooking Pot
structures.description:
Needed for cooking food.
Use of a cooking pot allows for a wider variety of meal preparation.
Requires a Fire Pal to light a flame.

structures.name: Cooler
structures.description:
A device that blows cool air, lowering the temperature of a base.
It doesn't provide much relief from the heat, but helps one to endure somewhat hot environments.
Requires an Ice Pal for cooling.

structures.name: Cooler Box
structures.description:
Small food vault.
Assign an Ice Pal to help prevent
food stored inside from spoiling.

structures.name: Cold Food Box
structures.description:
A feeding box that can be kept cold.
Assign an Ice Pal to it and
the food inside will be less likely to spoil.

structures.name: Ore Mining Site
structures.description:
Facility for producing <itemName id=|CopperOre|/>.
Mining <itemName id=|CopperOre|/> is hard work that requires physical endurance.
Leave it to Pals skilled at mining.

structures.name: Ore Mining Site II
structures.description:
Facility for producing large quantities of <itemName id=|CopperOre|/>.
Mining <itemName id=|CopperOre|/> is hard work that requires physical endurance.
Leave it to Pals skilled at mining.

structures.name: Wooden Counter
structures.description: Decorative wooden counter.

structures.name: Crusher
structures.description:
Facility for breaking down <itemName id=|Stone|/> and <itemName id=|Wood|/> to exchange them for other materials.
Requires Pal with the Watering trait to spin the water turbine.

structures.name: Hexolite Quartz Mine
structures.description:
Facility for producing <itemName id=|RainbowCrystal|/>s. 
Digging <itemName id=|RainbowCrystal|/>s is grueling physical work. 
Leave it to a Pal that is good at mining.

structures.name: Antique Curtain
structures.description:
Decorative antique curtain.

structures.name: Training Dummy

Training dummy shaped like a <characterName id=|Penguin|/>.
Can only be placed in wide open areas.

structures.description: Decorative Feybreak flag.

structures.name: Mounted Crossbow
structures.description:
A defensive installation for protecting a base from enemies.
Assign a Pal with Handiwork suitability and it will protect a base using the crossbow.

structures.name: Mounted Gatling Gun
structures.description:
A defensive installation for protecting a base from enemies.
Assign a Pal with Handiwork suitability and it will protect a base using the gatling gun.

structures.name: Mounted Machine Gun
structures.description:
A defensive installation for protecting a base from enemies.
Assign a Pal with Handiwork suitability and it will protect a base using the machine gun.

structures.name: Ancient Turret
structures.description:
An unmanned turret with rocket launcher-grade firepower. 
This completely automated system relies on electricity to get the job done, forgoing ammo or Pal assistance. 
However, with great power comes a great drain on electrical resources.

structures.name: en Text
structures.description: en Text

structures.name: Mounted Missile Launcher
structures.description:
A defensive installation for protecting a base from enemies.
Assign a Pal with Handiwork suitability and it will protect a base using the missile launcher.

structures.name: Sandbag
structures.description:
A defensive installation for protecting a base from enemies.
Place a Pal and it will ignore other work

structures.name: Stone Defensive Wall
structures.description:
Massive defensive wall to prevent enemy intrusions.
Made from stone, it is reasonably sturdy.

structures.name: Metal Defensive Wall

Massive defensive wall to prevent enemy intrusions.
Made from metal, it is extremely durable.

structures.name: Wooden Defensive Wall

Massive defensive wall to prevent enemy intrusions.
Made from wood, it breaks easily.

structures.name: Iron Desk
structures.description: Decorative iron desk.

structures.name: Antique Desk
structures.description: Decorative antique desk.

structures.name: Dimensional Pal Storage
structures.description:
A facility for storing a large number of captured Pals. 
Any guild member can deposit or withdraw Pals.
If you set it to private, it can serve as your personal Pal storage.

structures.name: Pal Disassembly Conveyor
structures.description: A dream-like facility that automatically butchers any Pal that is placed inside.

structures.name: Viewing Cage
structures.description:
Container for observing captured Pals.
Pals inside cannot participate in battle or production,
but they do not become hungry.

structures.name: Electric Cooler
structures.description:
A device that blows cool air, lowering the temperature of a base.
Using electricity, it can really lower the temperature.
Requires an Ice Pal for cooling.

structures.name: Power Generator
structures.description:
A power generator fueled by Electric Pals.
Electric equipment won't run without this.

Device for incubating Pal eggs.
Requires electricity, but automatically keeps the
inside of the incubator at appropriate temperatures.

structures.name: Electric Heater
structures.description:
A device that blows warm air, raising the temperature of a base.
Using electricity, it can really heat things up.
Requires a Fire Pal to light a flame.

structures.name: Electric Kitchen
structures.description:
Needed for cooking food.
It requires electricity to run, but allows a large amount of meals to be prepared rapidly.
Requires a Fire Pal to light a flame.

structures.name: Accumulator

structures.name: Pal Expedition Station
structures.description:
A facility that allows Pals to be sent on expeditions to places like dungeons. 
The dispatched Pals engage in battles and gather items, bringing back resources to the base.
