technology.name: Pal Dressing Facility
technology.description:
Pal Dressing Facility.
Give your Pals a new look!
Skins obtained inside and outside the game can be applied here!

technology.name: Heavy Assault Rifle
technology.description:
Ammo for the Heavy Assault Rifle.
Can be crafted at Ancient Workbench.

technology.name: Heavy Assault Rifle Ammo
technology.description:
Ammo for the Heavy Assault Rifle.
Can be crafted at Ancient Workbench.

technology.name: Laser Sword
technology.description:
A Beam Sword made from Soralite Ingots. 
The high-intensity beam severs targets the second they get within range, making this perfect for close-quarter combat.

technology.name: Mechanical Bow
technology.description:
Enhanced arrows for shooting with Mechanical Bow.
Can be crafted at Ancient Workbench.

technology.name: Mechanical Bow Ammo
technology.description:
Enhanced arrows for shooting with Mechanical Bow.
Can be crafted at Ancient Workbench.

technology.name: Tactical Grenade Launcher
technology.description:
Ammo for the Tactical Grenade Launcher.
Can be crafted at Ancient Workbench.

technology.name: Tactical Grenade Launcher Ammo
technology.description:
Ammo for the Tactical Grenade Launcher.
Can be crafted at Ancient Workbench.

technology.name: Azure Oath Flag Set
technology.description:
Azure Oath Flag and Azure Oath Banner set. 
Proof of your victory over the Azure Oath.

technology.name: Soralite Quarry
technology.description: Facility for producing Soralites. Digging s is grueling physical work. Leave it to a Pal that is good at mining.

technology.name: Prototype Shotgun
technology.description:
Ammo for the Prototype Shotgun.
Can be crafted at Ancient Workbench.

technology.name: Prototype Shotgun Ammo
technology.description:
Ammo for the Prototype Shotgun.
Can be crafted at Ancient Workbench.

technology.name: Combat SMG
technology.description:
Ammo for the Combat SMG.
Can be crafted at Ancient Workbench.

technology.name: Combat SMG Ammo
technology.description:
Ammo for the Combat SMG.
Can be crafted at Ancient Workbench.

technology.name: Soralite Ingot
technology.description:
An ingot refined from ore unique to Sunreach. 
This metal is a key component of ancient technology and, subsequently, top-tier equipment and structures.
Can be refined at Ancient Furnace.

technology.name: Snowman
technology.description:
Place in base to improve cooling speed.
Placing more than one has no additional effect.

technology.name: Hot Spring
technology.description: Pals recover SAN while in a Hot Spring.

technology.name: High Quality Hot Spring
technology.description: Pals recover plenty of SAN while in the hot spring.

technology.name: Japanese-Style Hot Spring
technology.description:
Facility where Pals on base can rest. 
Its calming, traditional Japanese design offers an extra boost to SAN recovery.

technology.name: Stone Spear
technology.description:
Useful for close-range combat.
Its length allows you to stand further away when attacking.

technology.name: Metal Spear
technology.description:
Useful for close-range combat. 
The metal tip gives it increased attack power.
Can be crafted at High-Quality Workbench.

technology.name: Refined Metal Spear
technology.description:
Useful for close-range combat. 
The high-quality metal tip gives it increased attack power.
Can be crafted at Production Assembly Line.

technology.name: Lily's Spear
technology.description:
The spear cherished by Lily.
Punishes those who neglect their Pals.

technology.name: Lily's Spear (Enhanced)
technology.description:
An enhanced version of Lily's beloved spear. 
Pierces those who neglect their Pals.

technology.name: Electric Egg Incubator
technology.description:
Device for incubating Pal eggs.
Requires electricity, but automatically keeps the
inside of the incubator at appropriate temperatures.

technology.name: Egg Incubator
technology.description: Place a Pal Egg inside to incubate it.

technology.name: Pal Essence Condenser
technology.description:
Combines several Pals of the same type
to create a higher-ranked version.

technology.name: Pal Sphere
technology.description:
An item that captures Pals when thrown.
This basic model is only effective on low level Pals.

technology.name: Mega Sphere
technology.description:
An item that captures Pals when thrown. 
Its capabilities have been improved, allowing it to catch a wider range of Pals.
Can be crafted at Sphere Workbench.

technology.name: Giga Sphere
technology.description:
An item that captures Pals when thrown. 
Able to capture moderately powerful Pals.
Can be crafted at Sphere Workbench.

technology.name: Hyper Sphere
technology.description:
An item that captures Pals when thrown. 
Enhanced capabilities allow it to capture even more powerful Pals.
Can be crafted at Sphere Assembly Line.

technology.name: Ultra Sphere
technology.description:
An item that captures Pals when thrown. 
Not many Pals can escape its highly efficient design.
Can be crafted at Sphere Assembly Line II.

technology.name: Legendary Sphere
technology.description:
An item that captures Pals when thrown. 
Very few Pals can escape its perfected design.
Can be crafted at Sphere Assembly Line II.

technology.name: Ultimate Sphere
technology.description:
An item that captures Pals when thrown. 
Almost no Pals can escape its flawless design.
Can be crafted at Sphere Assembly Line II.

technology.name: Sphere Workbench
technology.description:
Produces Spheres for capturing Pals.
Requires Pal with Handcraft suitability.

technology.name: Sphere Assembly Line
technology.description:
Creates Pal Spheres at a faster pace.
Requires Pal with Handcraft suitability.

technology.name: Sphere Assembly Line II
technology.description:
Creates Pal Spheres at an even faster pace.
Requires Pal with Handcraft suitability.

technology.name: Advanced Sphere Assembly Line
technology.description:
An Assembly Line for producing spheres used for capturing Pals.
Advanced machinery has been introduced, allowing for the production of spheres at high speed.
Requires Pals that can work with their hands.

technology.name: Curve Module
technology.description:
Equipping it causes the sphere to spin with a curved trajectory. 
It becomes easier to catch Pals off guard, and increases capture power.

technology.name: Slider Module
technology.description:
Equipping it adds a slider spin to the sphere. 
The sphere curves at a sharp angle, making it easier to catch Pals off guard and increasing capture power.

technology.name: Heavy Weight Module
technology.description: Equipping it makes the sphere heavier, reducing its range but increasing its capture power.

technology.name: Homing Module
technology.description: Equipping it makes the sphere home in on Pals, further increasing capture power.

technology.name: Sniper Module
technology.description: Equipping it increases the sphere's range, allowing it to sharply capture Pals and enhancing capture power.

technology.name: Sniper Module Ⅱ
technology.description: Equipping it significantly increases the sphere's range, allowing it to sharply capture Pals and enhancing capture power.

technology.name: Hexolite
technology.description:
An alloy of Chromite and Hexolite Quartz. 
Used for building advanced equipment and structures.
Can be refined at Gigantic Furnace.

technology.name: Stone Gate
technology.description: Stone gate large enough for big Pals to pass through.

technology.name: Stone Structure Set
technology.description:
Set for building bases using stone.
Allows building of stone foundations, walls, ceilings, stairs and other things necessary for shelters.

technology.name: Stump and Axe
technology.description:
Place in base to improve logging speed.
Placing more than one has no additional effect.

technology.name: Nutrient Tonic
technology.description:
A nutrient-rich Nutrient Tonic that prevents hunger for a period of time. 
A concentrated, flavorful blend of nutrients ideal for long journeys.

technology.name: Tidy Table Set
technology.description:
A set of neat and tidy decorative tables. 
A clean base is a happy base!

technology.name: Antique Dresser
technology.description:
Dresser useful for giving yourself a remake.
Allows players to edit their appearance.

technology.name: Thermal Core
technology.description:
This core houses an intense thermal reaction that radiates a massive amount of energy. 
Ideal for powering advanced pieces of equipment.
Can be crafted at Production Assembly Line II.

technology.name: Large Toolbox
technology.description:
Place in base to improve handiwork speed.
Placing more than one has no additional effect.

technology.name: Mounted Torch
technology.description: Place it at a base to light the surrounding area.

technology.name: Electric Pylon
technology.description:
Place in base to improve electricity generating speed.
Placing more than one has no additional effect.

technology.name: Bear Trap (Small)
technology.description:
Immobilizes those who step on it.
Only effective on small Pals or humans.

technology.name: Bear Trap (Large)
technology.description:
Immobilizes those who step on it.
Only effective on large Pals.

technology.name: Mine
technology.description: Automatically detonates when stepped on.

technology.name: Electric Mine
technology.description:
Electrocutes those who step on it.
Electrocuted Pals are easier to capture.

technology.name: Ice Mine
technology.description:
Freezes those who step on it.
Frozen Pals are easier to capture.

technology.name: Hanging Trap
technology.description:
Catches Pals that pass through.
Only effective on small Pals and humans.

technology.name: Extra Weapon Holster
technology.description:
This holster allows the wearer to equip an additional weapon. 
Unlocks an extra weapon slot when equipped.
Carrying one is enough.

technology.name: Extra Weapon Holster 2
technology.description:
This holster allows the wearer to equip yet another additional weapon. 
Unlocks an extra weapon slot when equipped.
Carrying one is enough.

technology.name: Lockpicking Tool v1
technology.description: No key? No problem! These tools will allow you to try and pry open any treasure chest that would normally require a Copper Key.

technology.name: Lockpicking Tool v2
technology.description: No key? No problem! These tools will allow you to try and pry open any treasure chest that would normally require a Silver Key.

technology.name: Lockpicking Tool v3
technology.description: No key? No problem! These tools will allow you to try and pry open any treasure chest that would normally require a Gold Key.

technology.name: WallSignboard
technology.description:
A signboard to write on.
Can be hung on walls.

technology.name: Wall Torch
technology.description: Place it on a wall to light the surrounding area.

technology.name: Aquatic Construction Kit
technology.description:
Construction kit that allows foundations
to be placed on water.

technology.name: Advanced Weapon Assembly Line
technology.description:
An Assembly Line for producing weapons and ammunition.
Advanced machinery has been introduced, enabling high-speed weapon production.
Requires Pals that can work with their hands.

technology.name: Beam Scatter
technology.description:
This weapon excels at shorter ranged combat. 
Compressed energy is shot out as a scattering beam, dealing widespread damage.

technology.name: Beam Scatter Ammo
technology.description:
Ammo for the Beam Scatter.
Can be crafted at Ancient Workbench.

technology.name: Wing Pack
technology.description:
A portable glider that enables flight. 
Consumes Wing Cell to propel the user through the skies.

technology.name: Wing Cell
technology.description: The fuel required to power the Wing Pack.

technology.name: Wooden Gate
technology.description: Wooden gate large enough for big Pals to pass through.

technology.name: Wooden Structure Set
technology.description:
Set for building bases using wood.
Allows building of wooden foundations, walls, ceilings, stairs and other things necessary for shelters.

technology.name: Ladder
technology.description: A ladder that allows you to climb to a slightly higher place.

technology.name: Beta Wave Generator
technology.description:
A device that emits beta waves to energize Pals.
Increases the work speed of Base Pals.
Placing more than one has no additional effect.

technology.name: Primitive Workbench
technology.description:
Primitive Workbench for producing simple items.
Pals with Handcraft suitability help
speed up production.

technology.name: Palicite Ingot
technology.description:
An indomitable alloy formed by combining Soralite and Palicite. 
This incredibly rare material combines ancient technology with crystallized World Tree energy, and is vital for the construction of supreme equipment and structures.

technology.name: Meowmere
technology.description:
[Tides of Terraria]
According to the legend, this sword was brought back from a distant land by Croajiro.
Why? We have no idea...
Fires a bouncing cat projectile with each swing to attack enemies.
